title: €367.8 Billion Question: Guardrails or Blockade? [Promoted Content]
summary_full: The EU's proposed Cybersecurity Act (CSA2) could cost €367.8 billion over five years by excluding Chinese suppliers from 18 critical sectors. Forced decoupling is not just expensive—it is structurally self-defeating and risks becoming a blockade on Europe's own prosperity.
